meta.description: Comprehensive Tray.io script patterns extracted from production code

salesforce_composite_response_handler.description: Complete Salesforce composite/batch API response processing with comprehensive error mapping

salesforce_url_encoding.description: Properly URL-encode external ID values for Salesforce composite PATCH requests
salesforce_url_encoding.critical: Always use encodeURIComponent() for external ID values in URLs to handle special characters like #, /, ?, &, etc.
common_issues: Unencoded values cause Salesforce API errors

lookup_map_builder.description: Build efficient lookup maps using filter-reduce chain for O(1) access

error_deduplication.description: Deduplicate errors by counting occurrences and creating unique error entries

aggregation_reducer.description: Aggregate statistics from arrays of objects using reduce

percentage_calculator.description: Safely calculate percentages with division-by-zero protection

orchestration_only_exports_step.description: Minimal exports.step that delegates all logic to helper functions defined below
orchestration_only_exports_step.critical: NEVER define functions inside exports.step - all helpers must be defined below

destructured_input_3_to_5_params.description: Use destructured parameters for 3-5 input variables

object_input_6_plus_params.description: Use object parameter for 6+ input variables

error_types_enumeration.description: Standard ERROR_TYPES constant for consistent error handling
error_types_enumeration.template:
const ERROR_TYPES = {
  VALIDATION_FAILED: 'ValidationFailed',
  PROCESSING_ERROR: 'ProcessingError',
  DATA_TRANSFORMATION_ERROR: 'DataTransformationError',
  SALESFORCE_API_ERROR: 'SalesforceApiError',
  AUTHENTICATION_ERROR: 'AuthenticationError',
  AUTHORIZATION_ERROR: 'AuthorizationError',
  RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: 'ResourceNotFound',
  RATE_LIMIT_ERROR: 'RateLimitError',
  SERVER_ERROR: 'ServerError',
  SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: 'ServiceUnavailable',
  RECORD_LOCK_ERROR: 'RecordLockError',
  DUPLICATE_ERROR: 'DuplicateError',
  BATCH_ERROR: 'BatchError',
  TIMEOUT_ERROR: 'TimeoutError'
};

http_status_to_error_type_mapping.description: Map HTTP status codes to ERROR_TYPES
http_status_to_error_type_mapping.template:
const HTTP_STATUS_TO_ERROR_TYPE = {
  400: ERROR_TYPES.VALIDATION_FAILED,
  401: ERROR_TYPES.AUTHENTICATION_ERROR,
  403: ERROR_TYPES.AUTHORIZATION_ERROR,
  404: ERROR_TYPES.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND,
  405: ERROR_TYPES.VALIDATION_FAILED,
  409: ERROR_TYPES.DUPLICATE_ERROR,
  412: ERROR_TYPES.BATCH_ERROR,
  415: ERROR_TYPES.VALIDATION_FAILED,
  500: ERROR_TYPES.SERVER_ERROR,
  502: ERROR_TYPES.SERVER_ERROR,
  503: ERROR_TYPES.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
};

salesforce_error_codes_mapping.description: Map Salesforce-specific error codes to ERROR_TYPES
salesforce_error_codes_mapping.template:
const SALESFORCE_ERROR_CODES = {
  INVALID_SESSION_ID: ERROR_TYPES.AUTHENTICATION_ERROR,
  REQUEST_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: ERROR_TYPES.RATE_LIMIT_ERROR,
  UNABLE_TO_LOCK_ROW: ERROR_TYPES.RECORD_LOCK_ERROR,
  DUPLICATE_VALUE: ERROR_TYPES.DUPLICATE_ERROR,
  ENTITY_IS_DELETED: ERROR_TYPES.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND,
  REQUIRED_FIELD_MISSING: ERROR_TYPES.VALIDATION_FAILED,
  INVALID_FIELD: ERROR_TYPES.VALIDATION_FAILED,
  MALFORMED_ID: ERROR_TYPES.VALIDATION_FAILED,
  INVALID_FIELD_FOR_INSERT_UPDATE: ERROR_TYPES.VALIDATION_FAILED,
  FIELD_CUSTOM_VALIDATION_EXCEPTION: ERROR_TYPES.VALIDATION_FAILED,
  INVALID_BATCH_SIZE: ERROR_TYPES.BATCH_ERROR,
  ALL_OR_NONE_OPERATION_ROLLED_BACK: ERROR_TYPES.BATCH_ERROR,
  QUERY_TIMEOUT: ERROR_TYPES.TIMEOUT_ERROR,
  EXCEEDED_MAX_SIZE_REQUEST: ERROR_TYPES.VALIDATION_FAILED
};

retry_strategy_pattern.description: Define retry strategies with exponential backoff for different error types

immutable_reduce.description: Use reduce with spread operator for immutable accumulation

filter_reduce_chain.description: Chain filter and reduce for efficient data processing

array_spread_merge.description: Merge arrays immutably using spread operator

object_spread_merge.description: Merge objects immutably using spread operator
object_spread_merge.template:
const merged = {...baseObject, ...overrides};
const updated = {...original, field: newValue};

pure_function_helper.description: Define pure helper functions below exports.step
pure_function_helper.critical: Never modify input parameters, always return new values

unique_set_deduplication.template:
const unique = [...new Set(items)];
const uniqueIds = [...new Set(items.map(i => i.id))];

safe_array_access.description: Safely access array elements with default values

input_validation_pattern.description: Validate required input fields at start of exports.step

lodash_get_safe_access.description: Use lodash _.get for deeply nested property access

lodash_groupby.description: Group items by a property using lodash

moment_date_parsing.description: Parse and validate dates with moment

crypto_random_id.template:
const crypto = require('crypto');
const id = crypto.randomUUID();

buffer_base64_encode.description: Encode data to base64 using Buffer
buffer_base64_encode.template:
const { Buffer } = require('buffer');
const encoded = Buffer.from(data, 'utf8').toString('base64');

buffer_base64_decode.template:
const { Buffer } = require('buffer');
const decoded = Buffer.from(encoded, 'base64').toString('utf8');

try_catch_error_handling.description: Wrap exports.step in try-catch for global error handling

response_formatting.description: Format final response object for downstream steps

multi_source_data_merge.description: Merge data from multiple sources using lookups

array_chunking.description: Split large arrays into chunks for payload limits
array_chunking.critical: Keep payload under 400KB - implement chunking for large data
